site_title: Murmur — Open Source Local AI Voice Input
site_description: Speak to type, instantly. Local speech-to-text powered by FunASR, with AI polish. Zero data upload.
hero_subtitle: Speak to type, audio to text in seconds. Powered by FunASR, data never leaves your computer.
why_local_desc: Built-in FunASR model. All audio processed on your device. Zero data upload, zero privacy concerns.
why_chinese_desc: Paraformer-large optimized for Chinese. Outperforms Whisper and macOS Dictation in Chinese scenarios.
why_ai_desc: Remove filler words, fix mistakes, reformat text. Supports 10+ AI models including Ollama for local processing.
why_hotkey_desc: Press Cmd+Shift+Space to start, speak, press again. Text appears at your cursor automatically.
feat_recording_desc: FunASR Paraformer-large with FSMN-VAD and CT-Transformer for production-grade Chinese ASR.
feat_ai_desc: Auto-remove filler words, correct mistakes, and clean up spoken text with your preferred AI model.
feat_hotkey_desc: Cmd+Shift+Space to start/stop recording. Works system-wide, auto-pastes text at cursor position.
feat_privacy_desc: All processing happens locally. Your voice data never leaves your computer. No cloud dependency.
feat_models_desc: OpenAI, DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM, Ollama, LM Studio and more. Pick your provider, Murmur fills in the rest.
feat_files_desc: Import wav/mp3/m4a/flac files. Export to TXT, SRT, VTT, Markdown, or Word documents.
feat_history_desc: SQLite storage with full-text search. Browse, search, and export your past transcriptions anytime.
feat_i18n_desc: Full Chinese and English interface. Optimized for Chinese speech recognition.
how_step1_desc: Download for your platform, or use Homebrew / Winget. Double-click to install.
how_step2_desc: Press the global hotkey and start talking. Murmur captures your voice with FunASR.
how_step3_desc: Configure an AI model in Settings. Your spoken words become clean, polished text automatically.
models_subtitle: Choose your provider, Murmur handles the rest
faq_q1: macOS says 'cannot verify developer' and won't open the app?
faq_a1: Right-click the Murmur app → select 'Open' → click 'Open' again. This is macOS's security prompt for unsigned apps. Murmur is free open-source software without a paid developer certificate.
faq_q2: First launch is slow — what's being downloaded?
faq_a2: On first launch, Murmur downloads the FunASR speech recognition model (~1GB). Once downloaded, it's cached locally and won't need downloading again.
faq_q3: How do I configure AI text optimization?
faq_a3: Open Settings → enter your API Key in the AI section → select a model provider (DeepSeek, Qwen, Ollama, etc.) → save. AI optimization is optional — speech recognition works without it.
faq_a4: All data is stored locally in SQLite: macOS ~/Library/Application Support/murmur/transcriptions.db, Windows %APPDATA%/murmur/transcriptions.db. Nothing is uploaded to any server.
faq_a5: Export to TXT, SRT (subtitles), VTT (Web subtitles), Markdown, and DOCX (Word document).
faq_a6: Default: Cmd+Shift+Space (macOS) / Ctrl+Shift+Space (Windows/Linux). Press to start recording, press again to stop and auto-paste text at cursor.
cta_subtitle: Download Murmur, configure in minutes, speak to type today.
footer_description: Open source local AI voice input tool. Speak to type, powered by FunASR.
